description:
This tool returns a screenshot of a node in a .pen file.

Usage:
- IMPORTANT: Always analyze the returned screenshot image to make sure that the generated result looks correct, satisfies the design requirements and doesn't contain any visual errors, glitches or misalignment.
- IMPORTANT: Think carefully after you received a screenshot to detect any possible design issues or inconsistencies in the generated design.
- Use this tool to get a screenshot image representation of specific nodes, frames or other elements based on their IDs. This is useful to verify and compare the generated layout with the original design.
- You can also use this tool to check elements and design system components, to verify their layout and look.

filePath.description: An optional file path to access a .pen file.

nodeId.description: The ID of the node to get a screenshot of

name: get_screenshot
